name: sail
description: Migrate inference, sandbox execution, and agent harnesses to Sail; build observable agents; allocate preemptible GPU compute; and, in Claude Code, delegate heavy coding or analysis to Sail workers.

interface.longDescription: Migrate inference, sandbox execution, and agent harnesses to Sail; build observable agents; allocate preemptible GPU compute; and, in Claude Code, delegate heavy coding or analysis to Sail workers.
